channel.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
channel.description:
Hello,
I haven't been active in a while as I have been busy with other projects. With that being said, I have been trying to come back to Frontity for some future projects but have run into a roadblock that I hope somebody can help me with. I am not sure if I am missing something, but I have tried everything I can think of, and nothing has solved the issue.
So with that being said, the issue I am running into is that when running npx frontity dev in a new project, it does not recompile when changes are made in the project. This is what I get in the terminal:
``` (node:11736) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection (Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created) (node:11736) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection. SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000 - mode: development - target: module - public-path: /static/
webpack built client 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b in 18626ms i ｢wdm｣: Hash: 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b86a64419a1d4379926d9 Version: webpack 4.46.0 Child client: Hash: 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b Time: 18626ms Built at: 06/10/2021 8:50:36 PM Asset Size Chunks Chunk Names ../bundling/chunks.module.json 1.48 KiB [emitted] archive.module.js 73.6 KiB archive [emitted] archive archive~post.module.js 156 KiB archive~post [emitted] archive~post fonts/Inter-Bold-LATIN.woff2 32.9 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-Bold-US-ASCII.woff2 21.7 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-Bold.woff2 136 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-Medium-LATIN.woff2 32.5 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-Medium-US-ASCII.woff2 21.3 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-Medium.woff2 134 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-SemiBold-LATIN.woff2 32.7 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-SemiBold-US-ASCII.woff2 21.5 KiB [emitted] fonts/Inter-SemiBold.woff2 135 KiB [emitted] post.module.js 37.1 KiB post [emitted] post smartbuildings.module.js 7 MiB smartbuildings [emitted] [big] smartbuildings Entrypoint smartbuildings [big] = smartbuildings.module.js [0] multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/smartbuildings/client.ts 40 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./build/bundling/entry-points/smartbuildings/client.ts] 1.3 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@emotion/react/jsx-runtime/dist/emotion-react-jsx-runtime.browser.esm.js] 926 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/connect/src/index.js] 243 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx] 2.2 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/index.ts] 214 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/index.ts] 241 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/index.ts] 1.45 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/core-js/modules/es.string.replace.js] 3.96 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/client-overlay.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/client-overlay.js 1.79 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/client.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/client.js 6 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/node_modules/strip-ansi/index.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/node_modules/strip-ansi/index.js 189 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/process-update.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/process-update.js 3.39 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] [./node_modules/webpack/buildin/module.js] (webpack)/buildin/module.js 497 bytes {smartbuildings} [built] [./packages/twentytwenty-theme/src/index.js] 2.08 KiB {smartbuildings} [built] + 354 hidden modules Child server: Hash: 86a64419a1d4379926d9 Time: 21924ms Built at: 06/10/2021 8:50:39 PM Asset Size Chunks Chunk Names server.js 9.28 MiB main [emitted] [big] main Entrypoint main [big] = server.js [./build/bundling/entry-points/server.ts] 529 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/index.ts] 2.52 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/error-handling.ts] 500 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/scripts-stats.ts] 593 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/server-side-rendering.ts] 5.11 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/settings-and-store.ts] 1.66 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/image.tsx] 5.46 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/link.tsx] 709 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/script.tsx] 718 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/index.ts] 214 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx] 7.98 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/actions.ts] 9.14 KiB {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/index.ts] 241 bytes {main} [built] [./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/index.ts] 1.45 KiB {main} [built] [./packages/twentytwenty-theme/src/index.js] 2.08 KiB {main} [built] + 560 hidden modules i ｢wdm｣: Compiled successfully. ```
I have tried installing a clean build of Frontity over two computers, I have tried using both the Mars Theme and the Twenty-Twenty theme. I have tried creating a new packaged theme and again that has not worked. I believe it may have something to do with the Garbage collector error, but I am at a loss of what is causing it. I have tried multiple new packages to see if maybe it was a problem during install, and it doesn't seem to be the case.
I placed one of my fresh installs in this repo if it helps. [Tikio88/smart-building.io (github.com)](https://github.com/Tikio88/smart-building.io)
Thank you in advance for the help!

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: polasymbiose
item.description:
i´ve experienced the same issue and it is happening a couple of times a day now.
I have tried creating a new project and creating new package. It seemed to work for a while. Also tried everything on troubleshooting page (Keep Frontity Updated - Frontity Docs). Sometimes it works, sometimes not. At the moment i am stuck.

I am working with a colleague on the project. He doesn´t have the Problem.
Currently I have to delete my node modules and reinstall them. When i start the dev server i get updated state. But when I change my code I have to delete/reinstall them on every refresh.

We are working on a project with a tough timeline. Help is very much appreciated. I can add you to our github repo.

Downgrading frontity modules seems to work for me at the moment.
“@frontity/core”: “^1.9.1”,
“@frontity/html2react”: “^1.6.1”,
“@frontity/tiny-router”: “^1.3.2”,
“@frontity/wp-source”: “^1.11.1”,
“frontity”: “^1.14.1”,

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
Hi @codemonkeynorth,

Thank you so much for all of your help and suggestions!

It is now working after starting a new project. I am unsure of what changed, I am looking into it now, but the period in the projects name is not the issue as I tested a few projects without the period in the name.

I am just as confused as you as to why webpack was breaking. That being said, since it is working all of a sudden, I am assuming something has been updated between my first post and today?

Either way, I will try and see if I can find what was causing the issue and will update the post if I do figure it out. Until, then, thank you again for all of your troubleshooting suggestions

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
@ShaGui actually I just installed your repo and have the same issue. my other projects are fine so trying to track down what’s different

update:
solution: create a new frontity project and install mars-theme when it asks you which theme to install. once it’s finished delete mars-theme from packages and replace with your version

there’s something in the old dependencies that’s seemingly breaking webpack and I’ve no idea what.

I’m wondering if the . in your folder name caused any linking issues

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
apologies! you did mention that to begin with.

what’s your development environment / operating system? eg working under WSL (Windows 10 Ubuntu etc) but accessing files via the Windows filesystem rather than the Ubuntu mount filesystem won’t work properly

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
Yes, I have as stated in the first post! I’ve tried over 5 times now

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
Are they old projects ? Can you try it with a new Frontity install/project?

Localhost not refreshing and not updated 🙋Get Help
Hey @jct.sylvain can you try to create a new frontity project and check if the problem persists?

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
I have tried updating Frontity core and following the steps to in the Docs. I have also tried the release version of Node and the LTS version of node. I am really at a loss for why the issue is occurring

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
Have you tried update Frontity core?

gitbook-docs.frontity.org

Keep Frontity Updated

Maybe also try different versions of node with nvm?

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
I am accessing through localhost:3000. I also tested port 4444 and 8000 just to make sure. I Also just tested npm run dev and the same issue occurs.

Not a silly question at all, I also thought I may have been editing the wrong files, but I have now tried with 5 separate new projects on different hard drives, and they all have the same issue. I also confirmed as when I edit the files, I ran npx frontity dev and I could see the change. The issue is that if I change the files again while the node developer server is running, it doesn’t rebuild the project, meaning it doesn’t update with my changes.

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: codemonkeynorth
item.description:
That doesn’t look like an error. Are you accessing through localhost:3000?

does npm run dev also not work?

Also, and this may seem silly, but are you editing the right files?. I’ve sometimes done a search to edit a file only to find I’m editing the file from another project since the search was pointing to a different folder :S

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode

item.title: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
item.dc:creator: ShaGui
item.description:
Hello,

I haven’t been active in a while as I have been busy with other projects. With that being said, I have been trying to come back to Frontity for some future projects but have run into a roadblock that I hope somebody can help me with. I am not sure if I am missing something, but I have tried everything I can think of, and nothing has solved the issue.

So with that being said, the issue I am running into is that when running npx frontity dev in a new project, it does not recompile when changes are made in the project. This is what I get in the terminal:

(node:11736) Warning: Closing file descriptor 3 on garbage collection
(Use `node --trace-warnings ...` to show where the warning was created)
(node:11736) [DEP0137] DeprecationWarning: Closing a FileHandle object on garbage collection is deprecated. Please close FileHandle objects explicitly using FileHandle.prototype.close(). In the future, an error will be thrown if a file descriptor is closed during garbage collection.
SERVER STARTED -- Listening @ http://localhost:3000
  - mode: development
  - target: module
  - public-path: /static/


webpack built client 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b in 18626ms
i ｢wdm｣: Hash: 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b86a64419a1d4379926d9
Version: webpack 4.46.0
Child client:
    Hash: 92cfd5d96c66bd24764b
    Time: 18626ms
    Built at: 06/10/2021 8:50:36 PM
                                  Asset      Size          Chunks
                 Chunk Names
         ../bundling/chunks.module.json  1.48 KiB                  [emitted]
                      archive.module.js  73.6 KiB         archive  [emitted]         archive
                 archive~post.module.js   156 KiB    archive~post  [emitted]         archive~post
           fonts/Inter-Bold-LATIN.woff2  32.9 KiB                  [emitted]
        fonts/Inter-Bold-US-ASCII.woff2  21.7 KiB                  [emitted]
                 fonts/Inter-Bold.woff2   136 KiB                  [emitted]
         fonts/Inter-Medium-LATIN.woff2  32.5 KiB                  [emitted]
      fonts/Inter-Medium-US-ASCII.woff2  21.3 KiB                  [emitted]
               fonts/Inter-Medium.woff2   134 KiB                  [emitted]
       fonts/Inter-SemiBold-LATIN.woff2  32.7 KiB                  [emitted]
    fonts/Inter-SemiBold-US-ASCII.woff2  21.5 KiB                  [emitted]
             fonts/Inter-SemiBold.woff2   135 KiB                  [emitted]
                         post.module.js  37.1 KiB            post  [emitted]         post
               smartbuildings.module.js     7 MiB  smartbuildings  [emitted]  [big]  smartbuildings
    Entrypoint smartbuildings [big] = smartbuildings.module.js
    [0] multi webpack-hot-middleware/client ./build/bundling/entry-points/smartbuildings/client.ts 40 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./build/bundling/entry-points/smartbuildings/client.ts] 1.3 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@emotion/react/jsx-runtime/dist/emotion-react-jsx-runtime.browser.esm.js] 926 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/connect/src/index.js] 243 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/client/index.tsx] 2.2 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/index.ts] 214 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/index.ts] 241 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/index.ts] 1.45 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/core-js/modules/es.string.replace.js] 3.96 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/client-overlay.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/client-overlay.js 1.79 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/client.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/client.js 6 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/node_modules/strip-ansi/index.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/node_modules/strip-ansi/index.js 189 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/webpack-hot-middleware/process-update.js] (webpack)-hot-middleware/process-update.js 3.39 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./node_modules/webpack/buildin/module.js] (webpack)/buildin/module.js 497 bytes {smartbuildings} [built]
    [./packages/twentytwenty-theme/src/index.js] 2.08 KiB {smartbuildings} [built]
        + 354 hidden modules
Child server:
    Hash: 86a64419a1d4379926d9
    Time: 21924ms
    Built at: 06/10/2021 8:50:39 PM
        Asset      Size  Chunks                    Chunk Names
    server.js  9.28 MiB    main  [emitted]  [big]  main
    Entrypoint main [big] = server.js
    [./build/bundling/entry-points/server.ts] 529 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/index.ts] 2.52 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/error-handling.ts] 500 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/scripts-stats.ts] 593 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/server-side-rendering.ts] 5.11 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/core/src/server/middlewares/settings-and-store.ts] 1.66 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/image.tsx] 5.46 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/link.tsx] 709 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/processors/script.tsx] 718 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/index.ts] 214 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/html2react/src/libraries/component.tsx] 7.98 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/actions.ts] 9.14 KiB {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/tiny-router/src/index.ts] 241 bytes {main} [built]
    [./node_modules/@frontity/wp-source/src/index.ts] 1.45 KiB {main} [built]
    [./packages/twentytwenty-theme/src/index.js] 2.08 KiB {main} [built]
        + 560 hidden modules
i ｢wdm｣: Compiled successfully.

I have tried installing a clean build of Frontity over two computers, I have tried using both the Mars Theme and the Twenty-Twenty theme. I have tried creating a new packaged theme and again that has not worked. I believe it may have something to do with the Garbage collector error, but I am at a loss of what is causing it. I have tried multiple new packages to see if maybe it was a problem during install, and it doesn’t seem to be the case.

I placed one of my fresh installs in this repo if it helps. Tikio88/smart-building.io (github.com)

Thank you in advance for the help!

Read full topic
item.source: Unable to recompile in Frontity Dev mode
